mapper.select:
SELECT wpc.id, wpc.patient_id, wpc.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.bed_no, wpc.ward_id, wpc.ward_name, wpc.max_accompany_count, wpc.adjust_reason, wpc.operator_id, wpc.operator_name, wpc.create_time, wpc.update_time FROM ward_patient_config wpc LEFT JOIN patient p ON wpc.patient_id = p.id WHERE wpc.deleted = 0
AND wpc.ward_id = #{wardId}
AND wpc.patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
ORDER BY wpc.update_time DESC

SELECT wpc.id, wpc.patient_id, wpc.patient_name, p.patient_no, p.bed_no, wpc.ward_id, wpc.ward_name, wpc.max_accompany_count, wpc.adjust_reason, wpc.operator_id, wpc.operator_name, wpc.create_time, wpc.update_time FROM ward_patient_config wpc LEFT JOIN patient p ON wpc.patient_id = p.id WHERE wpc.deleted = 0 AND wpc.patient_id = #{patientId} LIMIT 1
